title: agropyron trachycaulum var. fernaldii
intro: Agropyron trachycaulum var. fernaldii, also known as Fernald's slender wheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The health benefits of Fernald's slender wheatgrass include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
